series_metadata.series_description: These records are reviewed in the preparation of the annual examination reports analyzing the financial condition of state-chartered banks and are prepared by independent auditors.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain paper copy in operating area until imaged and indexed on the computer, or until next examination is completed. Upon confirmation that paper copy was checked for quality and completeness, destroy. ; Microform: Retain microfilm in operating area as well as off-site storage facility until next examination is completed, then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain electronic files until next examination is completed, then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Microform: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
